canonical_name: his hand playing casually with her
the cold world into which he had come
the little girl she had petted and cared for like a doll, carried in her arms
the priestesses, who had petted and spoilt her
a child that should be born of the two royal lines
the son he dared not acknowledge
his truest parents; that Lot's sons
any sons Arthur might have when he should marry
one or two of his best trainers
one of the king's foot soldiers
a Saxon coming at me with one of those great blunt swords of theirs
the Moorish realms down in Spain
sickly girls who die before they are weaned, sometimes before they are baptized
an old man who does not want to ride out from his own fireside
the armed men to ride them
